title: ormocarpum gracile
intro: Ormocarpum gracile, also known as the small-eyedOrmocarp, is a plant species belonging to the Fabaceae family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Ormocarpum gracile include its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can help to reduce pain and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or ointments, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
